title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week brought major improvements to session analysis and platform reliability. The new session friction scoring helps you identify and resolve workflow bottlenecks more effectively, while enhanced debugging tools make troubleshooting faster. Platform stability improvements ensure smoother license management and cleaner documentation handling.

entries.headline: New session friction scoring identifies workflow bottlenecks
details: Automatically scores how smoothly your sessions run
Enhanced debugging tools help you troubleshoot issues faster
Detailed session logs show exactly where problems occur

entries.headline: Documentation now stays clean and organized automatically
details: Removes outdated content that clutters your workspace
Eliminates duplicate sections that appear multiple times
Keeps important information at the top where you need it

entries.headline: License management now works smoothly without interruptions
details: Provides clear warnings when your license expires soon

entries.headline: Skills library updated and better organized
details: Fixed naming inconsistencies across skill templates
Moved test content out of your main workspace
Added missing templates for easier skill creation
